nasb.text: It will become fine dust over all the land of Egypt, and will become boils breaking out with sores on man and beast through all the land of Egypt.”

esv.text: It shall become fine dust over all the land of Egypt, and become boils breaking out in sores on man and beast throughout all the land of Egypt.”

cnv.text: 這爐灰必在埃及全地變為微塵，在埃及全地的人和牲畜身上就必生出疹病和膿瘡。”

ccb.text: 这灰要变成尘土，散布在埃及每一个角落，落在人或牲畜身上，就会起疱长疮。”
